fields.label: Field Name
fields.description: The actual field name to export (e.g., product_name, description)

fields.label: Source DocType
fields.options:
Product Master
Product Variant
Product Family
Brand
Manufacturer
PIM Attribute
fields.description: The DocType where this field comes from

fields.label: Export Column Name
fields.description: Custom column name in the export (leave empty to use field_label)

fields.label: Sort Order
fields.description: Order of the field in the export (lower = first)

fields.label: Required
fields.description: This field must have a value for the product to be exported

fields.label: Default Value
fields.description: Value to use if the field is empty

fields.label: Transformation
fields.options:
Uppercase
Lowercase
Trim
HTML to Text
Truncate
fields.description: Optional transformation to apply to the field value

fields.label: Max Length
fields.description: Maximum character length (0 = unlimited). Used with Truncate transformation
